key_insights.insight: To become more creative, analyze your competition and elevate yourself by seeing the terrain while remaining curious, humble, and a predator.
key_insights.quote: If you want to be creative, more creative,you have to, one, compete.You have to be super analytical on yourselfand who you're competing against.You have to be elevated.You have to take yourself from where you are nowand position yourself and see the terrain.You have to be curious,humble, and a predator all at the same time.

key_insights.insight: True creativity is about releasing your inner self, like a sponge absorbing and rinsing, without worrying about other's opinions.
key_insights.quote: Because creativity, when you're creatingand it's like a rinse,whether the rinse, a sponge absorbs and eventually you got to rinse it out so it can absorb more.Do you think a sponge is like, oh, man, I don't want people to judge how I'm rinsing myself out or I'm going to make a mess.You know what I'm saying?A sponge ain't thinking about that.

key_insights.insight: The value in creativity comes first from its therapeutic value to the individual, then strategically it can be used to help others.
key_insights.quote: First, it has to help you you make sense of the world and whatever it is you're doing whetheryou're painting you're cooking you're teaching you're tutoring you're making songs you're makingdance you're writing films you're doing journals whatever it is you're doing you would haveabsorbed the world and rinsed and contributed in some way that brings progress to yourself and others.

key_insights.insight: When future casting, awareness is key to prevent anxiety; anxiety arises when uncontrolled future events invoke strong emotions.
key_insights.quote: The anxiety comes when it's things that are happening that you didn't control. And you're now having emotions because your imagination is now thinking of the outcomes of things that are out of your control.Now, when you're future casting and you're seeing stuff, you are controlling looking around the corner.

key_insights.insight: Instead of basing AI's future off of 'Terminator,' it's better to model it off of 'Star Wars', a world that embraces multiple models, languages, and cultures.
key_insights.quote: And if you're going to base it off of movies, then go Star Wars.Not Terminator.Star Wars, there's multiple Wars. Not Terminator. Star Wars,there's multiple models. There's multiple robots. They all speak differentfucking languages. But there's Jedi's.

key_insights.insight: We should strive to be Jedi in the age of AI, using our knowledge and capabilities to create a better world for others.
key_insights.quote: And if this is gonnatake us to where we arebetter humans to one another, thenfucking bring it.Because we can't get any worse than we already are with one another and i'm speaking that as a black personwe've seen what people can do to people it can't get any more worse so bring it the optimism bringit let's be better people. Let's love better.

key_insights.insight: Hard work is relative to the context, organ, or environment you're working in.
key_insights.quote: So hard work is relativeto what organ or who or what environment you're working in.

key_insights.insight: Those most afraid of AI are the ones who designed a system meant for others to fail, instead of the ones who are set up to fail.
key_insights.quote: We've been set up to fail. AI didn't do that. People did that. Now here's a tool for us to solve our problems ourself now. Grab it while you can. And we are now our own Calvary.Right?Because the people that are afraid are not the people here.

key_insights.insight: Distortion, a vibrational dis-ease, can lead to depression when left unchecked.

actionable_advice.advice: To be more creative, analyze yourself relative to others and elevate yourself to see the terrain.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify your competition and understand their strengths and weaknesses. Position yourself to have a broader perspective and greater awareness of the landscape.

actionable_advice.advice: When feeling overwhelmed by future-casting and its accompanying emotions, recognize the source of the anxiety and regain control.
actionable_advice.how_to: Distinguish between future casting, where you are purposely exploring the future, and uncontrolled worries about the future. If it's uncontrolled, identify what aspects are out of your control and refocus your energy on what you can influence.

memorable_stories: Will.i.am recounts making a looped tape using his sister's Teddy Ruxpin toy and his mother's stereo as a child.
Will.i.am describes the moment he realized his family was poor when his teacher assigned canned food donation and it went to his own house.
Will.i.am describes being raised in an all-Mexican neighborhood and that was beautiful.
contrarian_claims: True hard work is relative and depends on what part of the body or environment is working.
If you’re worried about what people think, you just have a costume of creativity on.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - will.i.am Opens Up: “I Would Have Had Children 10 Years Ago!!!” Guilt, Shame, Depression, Creativity & ADHD!
